text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today, I accompany Admire Vega and<n>Haru Urara
to a traditional inn.<n>Needless to say, the reason
being...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
All right, crew! Let's run through the<n>locations for
the poster photo shoot<n>tomorrow, shall we?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪ I'm so excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
First off, we'll take a photo here at<n>the entrance.
After that, we'll do<n>some solo shots of you two
separately.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
For Urara, I'm thinking of taking<n>photos of you in
the inn's main<n>attraction, the Sakura Lounge, while
you partake in our cherry<n>blossom-themed cuisine.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Cherry blossom-themed? I wonderwhat that means! Sounds fun though!♪

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
As for Ayabe, I'm thinking it'd be<n>great if you'd
pose in another<n>attraction of the inn, the Crimson
Courtyard. I'd love to capture you<n>beautifully
surrounded in that world of<n>autumn hues.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
And I'm positive the red accents of<n>the kimono
we've prepared will blend<n>perfectly with the
autumn leaves!<n>Man, I can't wait for tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll do what I can...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And thus, the day of the photo shoot<n>begins, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nooo, it's raining!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame, but there's no<n>changing the
weather. Ayabe, let's<n>scrap our previous plan and
move the<n>shoot indoors instead.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why? I'm fine getting a little wet.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
No. What if you catch a cold? As your<n>fan, I
couldn't possibly be<n>responsible for disrupting
your race<n>schedule. Don't worry! I've thought<n>of
other locations.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Like I said—why?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
To begin with, conditions are never<n>perfect in a
race—not the track, nor the<n>weather... not even my
own body.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yet, still, I run. Because none of those<n>are valid
reasons not to. After all...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Running is the decision I made. Thesame goes for this photo shoot. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you the one praising how<n>virtuous it is
that I never go back on<n>my word?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh right! The owner did say<n>something like that! I
remember,<n>because it sounded super cool!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Yeah, you're right. Whatwas I thinking?

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Then, please forget what I said about<n>changing our
plans. If you are willing,<n>shall we continue the
photo shoot?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Just let me know when you're<n>ready.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And thus, even amid a downpour, the<n>photo shoot
for the posters featuring<n>Admire Vega comes to a
successful<n>end.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later in the central plaza, I<n>come
across Admire Vega and Haru<n>Urara surrounded
by a large group of<n>students.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Urara, I saw your poster in front of the<n>station! You
were absolutely<n>adorable!
choice_data_list: Looks like someone's the center of attention.
Looks like someone's the center of attention.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, you're making me blush!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe, I wanna hear your story too!<n>Your pictures
were so awesome! The<n>one with you wistfully
standing in the<n>rain gave me goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing really to tell. I just<n>stood there
and had my photo taken.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, was it actually raining?! I<n>thought you had a
race later that<n>same day...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
In defense of the inn, I wasn't<n>troubled in any
way. Besides, they<n>provided me with a towel and
heater<n>afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I also... got to use their hot spring.
choice_data_list: I wish I'd taken a dip in the hot spring myself.
I wish I'd taken a dip in the hot spring myself.

You're surprisingly cut out to be a model, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I also... got to use their hot spring.
choice_data_list: I wish I'd taken a dip in the hot spring myself.
I wish I'd taken a dip in the hot spring myself.

You're surprisingly cut out to be a model, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's a little late to be saying that...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but the hot spring was so<n>relaxing!
Wouldn't you wanna go<n>again, Ayabe?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...If the opportunity presents itself.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If?! Awww, I wanted you to teach me<n>about the
constellations again.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We could see the stars from<n>the open-air
bath, so Ayabe taught<n>me loads about
constellations! ♪ She<n>had so much to say about
them!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The constellations I know of just<n>happened to be
in view, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The photographer was skilled, that's<n>all.

Really? If that's all it takes for a<n>quality photo,
then everyone would be<n>a model. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I saw your poster! ♪ It really, like,<n>highlights your
strong points, you<n>know?

Haaah ha ha ha! Indubitably so! You<n>looked
gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Gorgeous to the extent that even I,<n>beauty
incarnate, could not overlook<n>you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have heard your declaration of war,<n>and I shall
respond in kind!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ♪ A declaration of war?! Yeah,<n>totally! I
won't back down either,<n>then! I'm feeling a little
pumped! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Now that we are in accord,<n>shall we go
settle this photo shoot<n>battle?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm in! ♪ Should we all go to the hot<n>spring
together?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Hey, when did I say I was in on this?!<n>Can you all
stop dragging me into<n>things already?!
